title: Minimum Limit of Balls in a Bag

testcases.input: nums = [9], maxOperations = 2 Output: 3 Explanation: - Divide the bag with 9 balls into two bags of sizes 6 and 3. [9] -> [6,3]. - Divide the bag with 6 balls into two bags of sizes 3 and 3. [6,3] -> [3,3,3]. The bag with the most number of balls has 3 balls, so your penalty is 3 and you should return 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: - Divide the bag with 9 balls into two bags of sizes 6 and 3. [9] -> [6,3]. - Divide the bag with 6 balls into two bags of sizes 3 and 3. [6,3] -> [3,3,3]. The bag with the most number of balls has 3 balls, so your penalty is 3 and you should return 3.

The bag with the most number of balls has 2 balls, so your penalty is 2, and you should return 2.
